title.DANIEL: I walk to her bed and lie down behind her, holding her gently as I stroke her hair. “I’m sorry, my dear. I didn’t mean this. Give her some time to process everything.”
title.MAJDA: I stretch out my hand, still trembling as it clutches the chair. Someone calls out: ‘Majda, stop!’ But did you even hear it?
title.STRAZCI_PROLOG: The battle is over. Two immortal siblings, bound by an endless rivalry, have finally destroyed each other.
title.STRAZCI_MATT: I wake up in a soft bed inside a white room filled with morning light.
title.STRAZCI_ISABELA: I still can’t believe it, even after all these days.

content.sen-o-lidske-nesmrtelnosti: Clocks tick, time flows, flowers bloom and fade...
content.vlakova: The moment was brief and almost unnoticeable, yet beautiful...
content.cas: Time is a dimension used by everyone...
content.vanocni-prani: Dear Santa, I have a small wish...
content.vanocni-stromecek: The fireplace crackled as the smell of baked gingerbread filled the room...
